title: Blurred Panorama
description: Blurred a panorama of main menu!
body:
I created a simple texture pack that blurs the game's main menu panorama. ![How its look like](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JmXlwnK7/images/3279aae225d2f45f7fd7e63f606a0616827caa44.gif)
